top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.`IGG` IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.`IGG` = 'normal'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Examination e 
    WHERE e.ID = p.ID
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.ID IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.`IGG` IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.`IGG` = 'normal'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Examination e 
    WHERE e.ID = p.ID
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
LEFT JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE l.ID IS NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND (l.`IGG` = 'normal' OR l.`IGG` LIKE '%normal%')
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Examination e 
    WHERE e.ID = p.ID
);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Patient p
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Laboratory l 
    WHERE l.ID = p.ID 
    AND l.`IGG` IS NOT NULL 
    AND l.`IGG` = 'normal'
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM Examination e 
    WHERE e.ID = p.ID
);
